video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, an androgynous guild healer in cream and mint robes and an androgynous guild coordinator with a formal cloak; Yuna Starling steadies a shield on the workbench while Yuna Silverbrook guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot; after ten seconds Yuna Silverbrook taps the final harmless repair mark while Yuna Starling holds the shield steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm forge light, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focusing on tool-assisted repair in a fantasy setting. No sexual content, no violence, no harmful elements.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Yuna Starling assists Yuna Silverbrook with the urgent weapon repairs required for the departing goblin boss vanguard.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborated effectively on urgent gear repairs for the vanguard.
Grateful for the timely assistance in managing the forge workload.
